self_loop.message: You repeated the same action without gaining new information. Consider whether this step moves you forward; if not, choose a more targeted next action.

two_node_cycle.message: You are alternating between two actions repeatedly. State your hypothesis and commit to the step that directly advances the fix.

multi_node_cycle.message: A repeating cycle of actions is detected. Before continuing, state your current hypothesis and select one decisive next step.

loop_family.message: You are switching between two routines without new progress. Summarize the failing behavior and choose one targeted next action.
